# Sufuf (صفوف رايقة) — Project Blueprint

> AI-powered interior design platform for the Saudi market.
> Domain: **sufuf.pro**  ·  Brand: **صفوف رايقة**  ·  Repo: `aabdulraahem-jpg/decor`

---

## 1. Executive Summary

**Sufuf** lets a user upload a photo of their room, pick a style + samples + colors, and get a photorealistic 4K interior-design render generated by OpenAI's `gpt-image-2`. The platform consists of a public web app, an admin panel, a mobile iOS app (planned), and a NestJS backend backed by MySQL.

**Cost-control strategy**: free tier shows a paywall card after the first design instead of actually calling the AI. Paid users get the real, full-quality render delivered as PNG.

---

## 2. Stack at a Glance

| Layer | Technology | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Backend API | **NestJS 10 + Prisma 5 + MySQL 8** | Typed, modular, easy admin/auth boundaries |
| Public website | **Next.js 14 (App Router) + Tailwind + Cairo/Tajawal** | RTL Arabic, fast SSR, edge-ready |
| Admin panel | **Next.js 14 (separate app)** | Same stack, isolated cookie scope |
| Mobile | **Flutter (iOS first)** | Single codebase, planned Codemagic CI |
| Image gen | **OpenAI gpt-image-2** (default), DALL-E 3 fallback | Latest model, supports 4 sizes & quality tiers |
| Image processing | **sharp** → WebP (resize ≤ 2048px, q=85) | Lossless quality at small size |
| Storage | **Local disk** under `/home/sufuf/web/api.sufuf.pro/public_html/uploads/{samples,categories,references}/` served by nginx with `expires 30d` | Zero egress cost |
| Auth | JWT (15 min access) + opaque refresh token (30 d, rotated) | Standard, works for web + mobile |
| Anti-bot | Cloudflare Turnstile + honeypot + FingerprintJS + signed device ID + IP rate + geo flag | 5 layers, all client-async |
| Phone OTP | WhatsApp Cloud API (Meta, free 1k/mo) → email OTP fallback (nodemailer) | Free where possible |
| Payments | Amazon Payment Services (APS / PayFort) — Mada, Apple Pay, Visa, MC | Saudi-compliant gateway |
| CDN / proxy | nginx (Hestia-managed), TLS via Let's Encrypt | Already on the box |
| Process manager | PM2 (root daemon, auto-restart, dump.pm2 persisted) | Survives reboot |

---

## 3. Topology (production)

```
                      ┌──────────────┐
                      │  sufuf.pro   │  Next.js 14 (port 3003)  ── pm2: sufuf-web
   Public users  ────►│  www.sufuf.. │  /, /studio, /pricing, /history, /account,
                      │              │  /login, /register, /verify-phone
                      └──────┬───────┘
                             │ /api/proxy/* (httpOnly cookie)
                             ▼
                      ┌──────────────┐
                      │ api.sufuf.pro│  NestJS 10 (port 4000)  ── pm2: sufuf-api
                      │              │  /api/v1/* + /health + /uploads/* (static)
                      └──┬─────────┬─┘
                         │         │
                         │         └──────────► MySQL (sufuf_sufuf_db)
                         ▼
                      ┌──────────────┐
                      │admin.sufuf.. │  Next.js 14 (port 3002)  ── pm2: sufuf-admin
                      │              │  /samples, /palette, /site, /users,
                      │              │  /packages, /transactions, /settings/*
                      └──────────────┘

  /uploads/ → nginx alias → /home/sufuf/web/api.sufuf.pro/public_html/uploads/
                            (samples/, categories/, references/) — served direct, 30d cache
```

PM2 list (snapshot):
- `sufuf-api`     fork  port 4000  cwd `/home/sufuf/sufuf/backend`
- `sufuf-admin`   fork  port 3002  cwd `/home/sufuf/sufuf/admin`
- `sufuf-web`     fork  port 3003  cwd `/home/sufuf/sufuf/web`
- `enmaa-api`, `ai-bot` — unrelated existing apps on the same host

## 4. Repository Layout

```
/home/sufuf/sufuf
├── backend/                  NestJS API
│   ├── prisma/
│   │   ├── schema.prisma         # canonical DB schema
│   │   ├── seed.ts               # initial admin + packages + legacy catalog
│   │   └── seed-samples.ts       # styles + samples + colors + spaces + showcase + system prompt
│   └── src/
│       ├── main.ts               # Helmet, cookie-parser, trust-proxy, /api/v1 prefix
│       ├── app.module.ts         # all module wiring
│       └── modules/
│           ├── auth/             # JWT + Turnstile + Security + WhatsApp + EmailOTP + lockout
│           ├── users/            # /users/me etc.
│           ├── samples/          # SampleCategory + Sample CRUD, AI describe, reference upload
│           ├── palette/          # Color + SpaceType CRUD
│           ├── site/             # SiteContent (singleton) + Showcase CRUD
│           ├── designs/          # generation entrypoint (currently STUB — no AI)
│           ├── packages/         # Points packages
│           ├── payments/         # APS integration (sandbox-ready)
│           ├── projects/         # User projects
│           ├── catalog/          # legacy furniture/walls/tiles/colors/decor
│           ├── admin/            # admin endpoints (stats, users, txns, settings)
│           ├── storage/          # multer + sharp → WebP pipeline
│           └── health/
│
├── admin/                    Next.js admin panel (sufuf-admin :3002)
│   └── src/app/
│       ├── api/{login,session,proxy/[...path]}/   server-side auth + proxy
│       ├── login/, dashboard/, packages/, users/, transactions/
│       ├── samples/         categories + samples (admin CRUD + AI describe button)
│       ├── palette/         master colors + space types
│       ├── site/            home content editor + showcase manager
│       └── settings/{aps,ai}/   APS creds + OpenAI key + system prompt
│
├── web/                      Next.js public site (sufuf-web :3003)
│   └── src/
│       ├── app/             /, /studio, /history, /pricing, /account,
│       │                    /login, /register, /verify-phone,
│       │                    /api/proxy/*, /api/auth/{login,register,logout}
│       ├── components/      navbar, footer, turnstile, teaser-studio
│       └── lib/             api.ts (typed client), security.ts (FP + signed device ID)
│
├── mobile/                   Flutter app (scaffolded, mocked data)
├── deploy/                   tarballs (gitignored)
├── BLUEPRINT.md              ← this file
├── CLAUDE.md                 onboarding context for Claude Code
└── README.md
```

---

## 5. Data Model

### 5.1 Users & access
- `users` — email (unique), passwordHash (argon2id), role (USER|ADMIN), pointsBalance (default **5**), failedLoginAttempts, lockedUntil, lastLoginAt+Ip, signupIp, **phoneHash** (unique, peppered SHA-256 of E.164), **deviceFingerprint** (sha256 of ip+ua+deviceId), **browserFingerprint** (FingerprintJS visitorId, peppered), **signedDeviceId** (SubtleCrypto-signed deviceId, peppered), signupCountry, geoMismatch, phoneVerified[At], bonusGranted
- `refresh_tokens` — sha256(token), userId, expiresAt, revokedAt
- `phone_verifications` — phoneE164, codeHash (sha256 of 6-digit), expiresAt, verifiedAt, attempts
- `email_verifications` — same shape, for SMTP fallback
- `signup_fingerprints` — audit trail per signup (ip, /24 network, fingerprint, ua)
- `abuse_flags` — `(kind, value)` unique pairs (`ip` / `fingerprint` / `device` / `phone-hash`) with `reason`

### 5.2 Design content
- `sample_categories` — slug (unique), name, **kind** (SAMPLE|STYLE), description, imageUrl?, sortOrder, isActive
- `samples` — categoryId, name, description?, imageUrl? (nullable for STYLE-only options), **aiPrompt** (English fragment), **colorMode** (NONE|PRESET|ANY), **presetColorIds** (Json[]), widthCm?, heightCm?, thicknessMm?, modelNumber?, valueSar? (hidden from public)
- `colors` — code (e.g. C-001 unique), name, hex, family, sortOrder
- `space_types` — slug (unique), name, icon (emoji), sortOrder
- `site_content` — singleton row with brandName/Tagline, hero* fields, ctaPrimary/Secondary, trustLine, freeQuotaText
- `showcase` — title, description?, imageUrl, badge?, sortOrder, isActive

### 5.3 User projects & generation
- `projects` — userId, name, roomType, originalImageUrl
- `designs` — projectId, generatedImageUrl, **promptUsed** (full prompt with system + samples + colors), customPrompt?, imageSize (1024×1024 / 1024×1792 / 1792×1024), **sampleIdsJson** (snapshot), referenceImageUrl?, parametersJson (status: PENDING_PAYMENT etc.), modelUsed, pointsConsumed
- `ai_generation_logs` — userId, projectId, designId, requestPayload, responsePayload, modelUsed, durationMs, status

### 5.4 Commerce
- `packages` — name, pointsAmount, priceSar, profitMargin, isActive, sortOrder
- `transactions` — userId, packageId, amountPaid, pointsAdded, status (PENDING|SUCCESS|FAILED|REFUNDED), apsTransactionId, apsResponsePayload
- `api_settings` — provider (OPENAI|APS), modelName, modelConfigJson (apiKey, quality, visionModel, **systemPrompt**, ...), isActive

---

## 6. Key Flows

### 6.1 Anonymous teaser (homepage)
1. Visitor lands on `/` → uploads room photo (no auth)
2. `<TeaserStudio>` runs **5-step motion-graphics animation** (scan-line + shimmer)
3. Shows **blurred** preview of their actual upload + paywall: "سجّل لرؤية التصميم كاملاً + 5 تصاميم مجانية"
4. Image data-URL is stashed in `sessionStorage` and auto-loaded into `/studio` after register

### 6.2 Registration (anti-abuse pipeline)
Client (`/register` page):
- Pre-warms in `useEffect`: `getDeviceId()` (UUID), `getBrowserFingerprint()` (FingerprintJS lazy), `getSignedDeviceId()` (ECDSA in IndexedDB)
- Honeypot field `website` (absolute -10000px, aria-hidden)
- Cloudflare Turnstile widget

Server (`POST /auth/register`):
1. **Honeypot** — if `website` non-empty → record IP+fp to `abuse_flags`, return 401
2. **Pre-block** — reject if IP/fp/device already in `abuse_flags`
3. **Turnstile** verification
4. **Email** unique check
5. **Phone** normalize via `google-libphonenumber` → `phoneHash` unique check (catches reformats)
6. **Device fingerprint** + **browser fingerprint** + **signed device ID** dup checks
7. **IP rate** ≤ 2 / 7 days
8. **Geo** mismatch flag (phone country vs IP country via `geoip-lite` offline lookup)
9. Create user with **5 points** (= 1 free design at 5 pts/design)

### 6.3 Phone OTP (WhatsApp first, fallback to admin log)
- `POST /auth/phone/start` → 6-digit code → `WhatsAppService.sendOtp()`. If Meta Cloud API not configured → `Logger.warn` (admin reads `pm2 logs sufuf-api` and forwards manually)
- `POST /auth/phone/verify` (JWT required) → grants **+5 bonus points** (one-time via `bonusGranted` flag) and links phone

### 6.4 Design generation (cost-control)
1. User in `/studio` picks STYLE category options (single-select per category) + SAMPLE items (multi-select) + per-sample colors + reference image + size
2. Click "توليد التصميم (5 نقاط)"
3. Backend: build full prompt (system prompt + sample aiPrompts + color tags + custom prompt) → **does NOT call OpenAI** → save Design row with `parametersJson.status = "PENDING_PAYMENT"` → deduct 5 points
4. Frontend: show **paywall card** "تصميمك جاهز — اختر باقة لاستلام النسخة كاملة"
5. After successful APS payment (TODO hook) → re-trigger OpenAI with the saved prompt → update Design with the real PNG URL → email to user

### 6.5 Admin content workflow
- **Site editor** (`/site`) — hero text, banner image, CTAs, trust line, showcase items
- **Samples** (`/samples`) — kind toggle, image upload (auto-WebP), **✨ "صف بالذكاء"** button calls `/samples/admin/describe` (OpenAI vision via `gpt-4o-mini`) to auto-fill `aiPrompt`
- **Palette** (`/palette`) — colors (master shared) + space types
- **AI settings** (`/settings/ai`) — model, quality, vision model, **system prompt** (prepended to every generation)

---

## 7. Security Posture

| Threat | Mitigation |
|---|---|
| XSS stealing JWT | All API calls go through `/api/proxy/*` Next route; cookie is `httpOnly`+`secure`+`sameSite=lax` so JS cannot read it |
| Brute-force login | Throttler 5/min per IP + account lockout after 5 fails for 15 min |
| Brute-force register | Throttler 3/min per IP + IP rate ≤ 2 / 7 d + Turnstile + honeypot |
| Multi-account abuse | 5-layer signup fingerprint (deviceId, browser FP, signed device ID, phone hash, IP /24 net) + geo flag |
| Phone reformat bypass | `google-libphonenumber` → E.164 → SHA-256 with server pepper → unique constraint |
| Bot signup | Honeypot field + Turnstile + IP-rate; honeypot trigger blacklists IP+fp permanently |
| OpenAI cost burn | **Generation is stubbed for free users** — pay first, render second |
| Reference image bombing | nginx `client_max_body_size 50M` + `proxy_request_buffering off`; sharp rejects non-images and >8MB |
| Token theft | 15-min access token + opaque refresh token (sha256-stored, rotated on use) |
| Trust-proxy spoofing | `app.set('trust proxy', 'loopback')` — only nginx (127.0.0.1) is trusted |

---

## 8. Environment Variables

`backend/.env` (production secrets — never committed):
- `DATABASE_URL` mysql connection
- `JWT_SECRET` (strong random; also used as pepper for hashes)
- `JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN=15m`, `JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN=30d`
- `CORS_ORIGINS` comma-separated
- `TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY` Cloudflare
- `WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID`, `WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN`, `WHATSAPP_TEMPLATE_NAME` (Meta Cloud API)
- `SMTP_HOST/PORT/USER/PASS/FROM` for email OTP fallback
- `OPENAI_API_KEY` fallback (real key kept in admin DB instead)
- APS creds (also kept in DB after admin onboards)

`admin/.env` and `web/.env`:
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=https://api.sufuf.pro/api/v1`
- `SUFUF_API_INTERNAL_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api/v1` (server-side proxy target)
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY=...`

---

## 9. Local-to-Production Workflow

1. Edit code on the server (`/home/sufuf/sufuf/`)
2. `cd backend && npx prisma db push` if schema changed
3. `npm run build` in each app that changed
4. `cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static` (Next standalone needs static copied)
5. `pm2 restart sufuf-api sufuf-admin sufuf-web --update-env`
6. `pm2 save`
7. `git add -A && git commit && git push origin main`

---

| 5-layer anti-abuse (FP + signed device + phone hash + honeypot + geo) | ✅ live |

| Sample/category CMS + AI describe | ✅ live |
| Master color palette + space types | ✅ live + 30 colors + 28 spaces seeded |
| System prompt management | ✅ live + comprehensive default prompt |
| sufuf.pro public site (hero + studio + history + pricing + account + verify-phone) | ✅ live |
| Studio cost-control (no OpenAI for free) | ✅ live (paywall card) |
| Real generation after payment | ⏳ needs APS hook + reusable trigger |
| APS payment | ⏳ wired (sandbox), waiting on real merchant creds |
| Mobile app — API connection | ⏳ Flutter scaffolded with mocks |
| iOS App Store deployment via Codemagic | ⏳ waiting on Apple Developer account |
| Force-update / soft-update endpoint for mobile | 📋 planned |
| Google OAuth | 📋 scaffolded, needs Google client ID |

---

## 11. Roadmap (suggested order)

**Now → 1 week**
- Get Apple Developer account → set up Codemagic CI for Flutter iOS build
- Get APS merchant account → wire `/payments/initiate` + `/payments/webhook` end-to-end
- Apply for WhatsApp Business Cloud API verification (3-5 days)
- Configure SMTP (Gmail App Password) for immediate Email-OTP capability
- Replace 6 showcase placeholder rows with real beautiful renders

**Week 2-3**
- Build the **post-payment generation trigger**: webhook → enqueue OpenAI → save final PNG → email user
- Connect Flutter `mobile/` repositories from mock data to live `/api/v1`
- Add force-update endpoint `/app/version` and gate the mobile app launcher
- Implement Google OAuth (already scaffolded — just needs Google client ID/secret)

**Month 2**
- Add a CDN (Cloudflare in front of nginx) for global edge caching of `/uploads/*`
- Add admin dashboards: revenue chart, MRR, conversion funnel, abuse flags review
- Localize for English (i18n switch)
- Add referral codes (1 referral = +5 bonus points for both)

---

## 12. Conventions / House Rules

- Always WebP for image storage; PNG only for final paid renders
- All Arabic UI text on the public site; admin can stay bilingual
- AI prompts in English (DALL-E / gpt-image-2 perform better in English)
- Schema changes via `prisma db push` (no migration files yet — single dev environment)
- Commits use a structured "Phase N: ..." prefix when shipping a coherent slice
- Never push to main without local build passing in all three apps
- Never call OpenAI in dev/test paths — use `gpt-image-2` only after explicit user payment

---

_This blueprint is the canonical onboarding document. When something diverges, update this file in the same commit._
